title: Sidebar artifact tree component with search and drag-and-drop support
purpose: Displays session artifacts in a searchable, collapsible tree structure with context menu actions and drag-and-drop file upload capabilities.
module_context: Exports the ArtifactTree React component that aggregates session store data into a sectioned tree with search, show-deprecated toggle, drag-and-drop upload, and context-menu actions.

methods.name: toTabDescriptor
methods.normalized_params: (node: TreeNode): { id: string; kind: "artifact" | "embed" | "blueprint"; artifactType?: ArtifactType; artifactId: string; name: string } | null

steps.content: Transform an artifact node into a tab descriptor object based on its kind and artifact type.
Return null for nodes that do not match expected kinds.

methods.name: toArtifactNode
methods.normalized_params: (item: { id: string; name: string; deprecated?: boolean; pinned?: boolean; lastModified?: number }, artifactType: ArtifactType): TreeNode

steps.content: Convert a session item into a tree node with artifact kind and specified type.
Initialize session and sidebar store data.
Build base node lists for pinned, recently updated, blueprint, embed, image, diagram, document, design, spreadsheet, and snippet artifacts.
Apply visible filter to show deprecated and search results.
Load pseudo file list when the pseudo tab becomes active.
Render the sidebar tree with search, show-deprecated toggle, and drag-and-drop upload controls.
Handle drag and drop events for file imports.
Process file input changes for manual uploads.
Manage context menu actions for artifact operations.
Filter nodes based on deprecated visibility and search query.
Return nodes that are not deprecated and match the search query.
Prevent default drag behavior and validate session.
Process each dropped file by importing it into the session.
Handle errors during file import.
Prevent default drag over behavior.
Trigger the hidden file input click event.
Prevent default drag over behavior.
Process each selected file by importing it into the session.
Handle errors during file import.
Reset the file input value after processing.
Load document content from the API.
Update the document in the session store with the loaded content.
Handle errors during document loading.
Select the appropriate session item based on node kind and artifact type.
Load document content if the node is a document.
Check if the node is currently selected in the session store.
Return true if the node matches the selected item for its kind.
Prevent default context menu behavior.
Set the context menu state with node and mouse coordinates.
Convert a tree node into an item object for API operations.
Return null for nodes that do not match expected kinds.
Update the deprecated status of a blueprint in the document store.
Update the deprecated status of an artifact in the appropriate store based on its type.
Delete an embed artifact from the API.
Delete an artifact from the API based on its type.
Remove the deleted artifact from the session store.
Handle errors during artifact deletion.
Process context menu actions for pinning, deprecating, downloading, emailing, deleting, syncing, and pushing artifacts.
Update store state and perform API calls for each action.
Handle errors during action execution.

methods.name: renderSection
methods.normalized_params: (id: string, title: string, nodes: TreeNode[]): React.ReactElement | null

steps.content: Filter and sort nodes for display in a section.
Render a section header with toggle functionality.
Render tree nodes for the section if it is expanded.
